survivors_flagged.one_line: IMVT-1402 FcRn pivotal program post-batoclimab pivot; some 2026 topline readouts (Graves/CLE) but the heavyweight registrational reads (MG, RA) are 2027 — diffuse, not one imminent hard binary.
Live Western Union all-cash buyout at $16.00/sh; 50 of 51 US state regulators cleared, only NYDFS pending, close H2 2026 — clean dated arb with narrow tail risk.
RemainCo of the 2024 Sanofi spin; four 2026 oncology catalysts — chondrosarcoma BLA + ozekibart FOLFIRI PFS in Q2, INBRX-106 HNSCC viability read H2 — real dated asymmetry.
Unsolicited CEO-led take-private at $16.20/sh received Jun 17; independent special committee formed Jun 24 — live, dated, mispriced (no-certainty / possible bump-or-walk asymmetry).
Announced ~Mar 2026 intent to separate into two independent public companies (North America + EMEA) on a stated 12-15 month timetable, post DS-Smith integration - a real dated forward split.
Disc Medicine: post-CRL bitopertin Type A/FDA path plus APOLLO EPP topline expected Q4 2026 and RALLY-MF Q4 data + end-of-Ph2 meeting - a real dated binary, but multiple-quarter wait.
JINGDONG Industrials + JD Property HK spin-off/listings in motion; structural sum-of-parts unlock, but China-discount and partial-retention dampen asymmetry.
$600M buyback through 2028 + ~$900M dividend plan vs $3.2B net cash; dated capital-return vs huge cash pile, but slow-burn not imminent.

JDE Peet's acquisition (closed ~Apr 2026) then separation into Beverage Co. + Global Coffee Co. expected by year-end 2026; $7B Apollo/KKR backing, ~4.5x leverage de-lever path — dated, complicated, forward.
$48.7B Kenvue acquisition: both shareholder votes passed Jan 2026, now in FTC second-request review, close targeted 2H 2026 — dated regulatory binary with antitrust/synergy asymmetry (acquirer-side).
Dated Phase 3 binaries (DAYBREAK wet-AMD Q3-26, PEAK Q4-26) post positive GLOW2; clinical readout, not classic special-sit, asymmetry unconfirmed.

verified.catalyst: IMVT-1402 (FcRn) clinical program post-batoclimab pivot: H2-2026 proof-of-concept reads (cutaneous lupus topline; difficult-to-treat RA open-label update) ahead of the heavyweight registrational Graves'/MG readouts in 2027.
verified.dated_milestone: CLE proof-of-concept topline + D2T RA open-label update, "second half of calendar year 2026" (no hard date); registrational Graves'/MG topline in 2027.
verified.bloom_gates: G2 partial (concrete committed clinical readouts on management guidance) — fails G1 (no counterparty) and G3 (no specific currently-unpriced figure quantified).
verified.primary_source: Immunovant FY-Q4/FY2026 corporate update press release, May 20, 2026 (immunovant.com investor relations); corroborated by SEC 8-K and StockTitan coverage of the same filing.
verified.analysis: Verified via Immunovant's May 20, 2026 FY-Q4 corporate update: the only 2026 catalysts are a cutaneous-lupus proof-of-concept topline and a difficult-to-treat RA open-label update, both guided only to "second half of calendar year 2026" with no hard date, while the registrational Graves' disease and myasthenia gravis topline reads slip to 2027. The triage assessment is correct — this is a real, dated, forward FcRn program but diffuse, with the heavyweight binaries 12+ months out and the near-term reads being lower-stakes POC/open-label data on a soft window. Legitimate WATCH (real catalyst exists, none fired) but no single imminent hard binary to justify ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Western Union all-cash buyout of Intermex at $16.00/share awaiting the final regulatory sign-off (NYDFS) — the last of 52 money-transmitter approvals — to close.
verified.dated_milestone: NYDFS approval/close; merger-agreement outside date Aug 10, 2026 (auto-extends to Nov 10, 2026 if a NYDFS-related restraint persists) — H2 2026 close.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Western Union) + G2 (concrete $16.00/sh all-cash commitment, signed definitive agreement) + G3 (current ~$1.72/~12% gross spread to deal price unpriced, pending NYDFS)
verified.edge: M — deal terms and 51/51 ex-NY clearances are public, so it is not informationally hidden; the edge is the unusually wide ~12% gross spread the tape leaves for the single-state NYDFS binary plus a multi-quarter holding period, i.e. an underwriting/timing edge rather than an information edge.
verified.primary_source: Western Union & Intermex joint press release "Provide an Update on Pending Acquisition" (GlobeNewswire, 2026-06-24); merger-agreement outside-date terms per IMXI SEC 10-K/10-Q filings (FY2025/Q1 2026).
verified.kill_fact: PRIMARY-CONFIRMED: WU/Intermex joint update (GlobeNewswire/Intermex IR, dated 2026-06-24, RTTNews 2026-06-25) states money-transmission regulators in 51 applicable US states/territories and all international jurisdictions approved/non-objected, with one US state (NY DFS) still pending; parties actively engaged, closing as soon as practicable thereafter. Price $16.00/share all-cash CONFIRMED via WU & IMXI 8-K merger-agreement filings. Outside-date ladder CONFIRMED: initial May 11 2026, extendable to Aug 10 2026, then Nov 10 2026 if regulatory approvals still pending. Live FMP quote IMXI $14.29 (yearLow 8.58, 50/200-day avg ~15.25) vs $16.00 = ~$1.71 / ~12% gross spread, deal still OPEN (forward, not fired). CORRECTION: line's '51 of 51 applicable states cleared' is slightly off — it's 51 cleared with NY still pending, i.e. 51 of 52 applicable; substance (NYDFS = last holdout) is correct. Termination fees $27.3M (WU) / $19.8M (IMXI). Single-regulator hold-up is the genuine tail; spread persistence is consistent with NYDFS friction + Nov-10 outside-date drag. Thesis stands as a clean dated single-name merger-arb, not macro/story.
verified.analysis: Confirmed via the 2026-06-24 Western Union/Intermex joint press release and the merger-agreement terms: 51 of 51 applicable US states/territories plus all international jurisdictions have cleared, leaving only New York's NYDFS, with the parties actively engaged to obtain it and close as soon as practicable thereafter. At $14.28 vs the $16.00 cash terms, the ~$1.72 (~12% gross) spread is real and currently unpriced because the market is discounting NYDFS friction and the Aug-10/Nov-10-2026 outside-date timeline — a clean, dated, forward, single-name arb, not a macro bet. Tail risk is narrow but non-trivial (single-regulator hold-up; if it breaks, downside to a low-double-digit standalone level), which is exactly why the spread persists; score 7, ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: INBRX-106 (OX40 agonist) HexAgon-HN Phase 2 PFS readout in first-line HNSCC is the lone material un-fired dated binary, with Phase 3 activation alongside.
verified.dated_milestone: HexAgon-HN Phase 2 PFS data — Q4 2026; Phase 3 initiation — Q3 2026; chondrosarcoma PDUFA — April 14, 2027
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete commitment: dated PFS readout + Phase 3 start), G3 partial (HNSCC PFS figure currently unpriced, but ORR already disclosed)
verified.edge: L — the triage's "four 2026 catalysts" thesis is stale: three of four already fired (chondrosarcoma BLA filed Apr 2026 / accepted ~Jun 15; FOLFIRI CRC data cutoff Apr 10 2026 = 20% ORR; INBRX-106 interim ORR 44% vs 21.4% disclosed May 11 2026). Stock re-rated 6.5x ($13.97 low → ~$90.83), well above 200d avg $76.71; only the Q4 2026 HexAgon PFS remains as a genuine forward binary, and the easy asymmetry is already in the tape.
verified.primary_source: Inhibrx investorroom press release "Interim Phase 2 Data for INBRX-106 in First-Line HNSCC" (2026-05-11); SEC 8-K (2026-04-21, FOLFIRI data cutoff Apr 10 2026); SEC 8-K BLA acceptance / PDUFA Apr 14 2027
verified.analysis: Of the four triage catalysts, three have already fired by today (2026-06-29): the chondrosarcoma BLA was filed in April and accepted ~June 15 (PDUFA April 14, 2027), the ozekibart+FOLFIRI colorectal PFS read out April 10 (20% ORR, 5.5mo mPFS), and the INBRX-106 HNSCC interim ORR was reported May 11 (44.0% vs 21.4% on pembrolizumab). The shares re-rated from a $13.97 52-week low to ~$90.83 (market cap ~$1.33B), confirming the asymmetry was largely harvested. A real dated forward binary survives — HexAgon-HN Phase 2 PFS in Q4 2026 (plus Phase 3 start Q3 2026 and the H2 2026 CRC FDA accelerated-approval meeting) — so it earns a thin WATCH, but the "real dated asymmetry" framing no longer holds at this price.

verified.catalyst: CEO-led group (M.N. Business Strategy, incl. co-founder/CEO Moshe Mizrahy) made an unsolicited $16.20/sh cash take-private bid received Jun 17, 2026; an independent special committee was formed Jun 24 to evaluate it.
verified.dated_milestone: Special committee formed 2026-06-24; next: committee review/negotiation outcome — no fixed date set, but a recommendation or rejection is the next gating event (no definitive agreement yet)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: CEO Mizrahy / M.N. Business Strategy, with Bank Leumi $200M financing term sheet) + G3 (specific currently-unpriced figure: $16.20/sh cash vs $14.57 tape = ~11% gross spread; plus Steel Partners' Jan-2026 $18.00/sh float as bump reference)
verified.primary_source: InMode 6-K / Schedule 13D-A and company confirmation, via StockTitan/TipRanks, dated 2026-06-24 (proposal received 2026-06-17); price FMP quote 2026-06-29
verified.kill_fact: All core facts independently confirmed vs primary/credible sources: M.N. Business Strategy (incl. co-founder/CEO Moshe Mizrahy) made an unsolicited $16.20/sh all-cash take-private proposal received Jun 17, 2026; InMode confirmed it and formed an independent special committee on Jun 24, 2026; expressly non-binding, no definitive agreement, no stated deadline = live/forward, not fired. Bank Leumi preliminary $200M / 4-yr / SOFR+3.25% term sheet confirmed. Stock ~$14.63 (~10-11% below the $16.20 bid) confirms the no-certainty gap. Steel Partners' Jan 28, 2026 $18.00/sh public letter confirmed as a credible bump anchor. CORRECTIONS: (1) ownership ~ Mizrahy individually holds ~7.06% (4,299,226 shares per 13D/A); the ~7.9% figure likely reflects the broader affiliated group, not the named CEO stake. (2) Steel Partners' $18.00 was an offer for 51% of shares (a partial/control stake, rejected by InMode in Feb 2026), not a full take-private at $18 — so it anchors a bump ceiling but is not a clean apples-to-apples comparison. Real risks: no hard dated committee milestone; committee can reject or bidder can walk; lowball insider bid below an outside party's prior float.
verified.analysis: On Jun 24, 2026 InMode confirmed a Jun 17 unsolicited $16.20/sh all-cash proposal from a CEO-led group (co-founder Moshe Mizrahy; group owns ~7.9%), backed by a preliminary Bank Leumi $200M four-year term sheet, and formed an independent special committee to review it. The catalyst is live, dated, and forward: shares trade ~$14.57 (~11% below the bid), the proposal is expressly non-binding with no definitive merger agreement and no set deadline, and Steel Partners' January 2026 $18.00/sh float for 51% sets a credible bump anchor. This is genuine no-certainty bump-or-walk asymmetry, not a macro bet — verifiable gap is the lack of a hard dated milestone for the committee decision and the real risk the committee rejects or the bidder walks.

verified.catalyst: International Paper's board-approved plan to separate into two independent public companies — a North America IP and a new EMEA Packaging pure-play (dual-listed LSE/NYSE) — on a stated 12-15 month timetable post DS Smith integration.
verified.dated_milestone: Targeted spin completion ~Jan-Apr 2027 (12-15 mo from 2026-01-29 announce); next checkpoints = Form 10 / regulatory + board approvals (US + UK) progressing through 2026.
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete board-approved separation commitment: spin + ~20% retained stake + dual-list + named EMEA CEO + 12-15mo timetable); partial G3 (SoP/pure-play re-rate is the unpriced lever but the headline is ~5 months old)
verified.edge: L — real, specific, dated, forward spin, but announced 2026-01-29 (~5 months ago) so the headline is largely re-rated; stock $37.55 sits near the 200-day avg ($39.53), well off the $56 high. Residual edge is execution/SoP unlock on actual separation, not the announcement.
verified.primary_source: International Paper press release "To Create Two Independent Public Companies" (PR Newswire / IR site, 2026-01-29); Packaging Dive 2026-01-29 and Q1-2026 follow-up (2026-04).
verified.analysis: Verified: IP announced 2026-01-29 it will split into a North America IP ($15.2B 2025 sales) and a new EMEA Packaging company ($8.5B sales) via spinoff, retaining ~20% of EMEA for 12-18 months, with EMEA dual-listing on LSE+NYSE; completion targeted ~Jan-Apr 2027 pending US/UK regulatory and board approval. This is a genuine dated, forward, non-macro corporate separation that passes G2 (and partially G3 on the SoP unlock). It is downgraded to WATCH because the announcement is ~5 months old and substantially priced — the share at $37.55 trades near its 200-day average and far below the $56 52-week high — so the live edge now rests on execution and the pure-play re-rate at separation rather than the headline. Triage note's "~Mar 2026" date was slightly off; correct announce date is 2026-01-29.

verified.catalyst: Phase 3 APOLLO topline in bitopertin/EPP (Q4 2026) is the gating binary that, per the June 9 2026 FDA Type A alignment, can resolve the CRL and support traditional approval, with a concurrent RALLY-MF Phase 2 topline + end-of-Phase-2 FDA meeting also due Q4 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: APOLLO Phase 3 EPP topline expected Q4 2026 (next date); RALLY-MF Ph2 topline + end-of-Ph2 FDA meeting by year-end 2026; CRL response end-2026; FDA decision mid-2027.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (FDA as named counterparty with a concrete, committed regulatory path) + G3 (specific currently-unpriced pivotal readout: APOLLO Ph3 success/failure binary on the resubmission)
verified.edge: M — real dated FDA-blessed binary that is genuinely two-sided and not yet de-risked, but the multi-quarter Q4 2026 wait and the already-fired/re-rated Type A clarity (stock at $71.9, mid-200dma, not distressed) blunt near-term asymmetry.
verified.primary_source: Disc Medicine FDA Type A Meeting update via StockTitan/GlobeNewswire, 2026-06-09; RALLY-MF ASCO/Q1 update, 2026-06-02
verified.analysis: Verified: at the June 9 2026 Type A meeting the FDA agreed the ongoing Phase 3 APOLLO study, if successful, can serve as the CRL response and could support traditional approval, with APOLLO topline expected Q4 2026, CRL response end-2026, and an FDA decision by mid-2027 (StockTitan/GlobeNewswire, 2026-06-09). Separately, RALLY-MF Phase 2 (DISC-0974, MF anemia) topline is expected Q4 2026 with an end-of-Phase-2 FDA meeting by year-end (Q1-2026 update / ASCO June 2 2026). The catalyst is real, specific, dated, forward and not macro — but the readouts are roughly a quarter-plus out and the regulatory-path clarity is already public, so it sits as WATCH rather than ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: JD Property (JD.com ~75%-owned logistics-RE arm) refiled for a Hong Kong IPO on 2026-01-27, a SoP carve-out, but size/price range/listing date remain undisclosed.
verified.dated_milestone: HK IPO application filed 2026-01-27; next date undisclosed (no listing hearing/price range/listing date announced as of June 2026; 6-month app validity implies refile/progress ~mid-2026).
verified.instrument: JD (JD.com ADR, NASDAQ); listing vehicle is JINGDONG Property, Inc. on HKEX (stock code pending)
verified.bloom_gates: G2 partial — a concrete, dated corporate commitment (HKEX filing 2026-01-27), but it lacks a G3 currently-unpriced figure (no offering size/valuation disclosed) and lacks a firm forward date.
verified.edge: L — the larger sibling (JD Industrials) already listed Dec-2025 so the carve-out template is re-rated/known; JD Property unlock is ~75%-retained (stays consolidated in JD NAV, minimal de-stranding), no dated milestone, and JD's price ($25.2, near 52wk-low $24.5, vs 200d $30.1) is dominated by the China discount — making this largely a macro/China re-rate bet, not a clean idiosyncratic SoP catalyst.
verified.primary_source: Reuters via TradingView/Sahm Capital, "JD.com's Jingdong Property files for Hong Kong IPO," 2026-01-27; JD quote FMP 2026-06-29 ($25.21).
verified.analysis: JD Property refiled its HK IPO 2026-01-27 (second attempt after the 2023 application lapsed); 9M2025 revenue +21% to RMB3.0bn with net loss narrowing to RMB159m, managing RMB121.5bn of assets (~12.8% overseas). The catalyst is real and forward but un-asymmetric: no offering size, price range, or listing date has been disclosed (no firm next date), ~75% retention keeps the value consolidated, the sibling JD Industrials carve-out already fired in Dec-2025, and JD's depressed multiple reflects a China-discount macro overhang rather than a discrete SoP gap. Verifiable to the filing but the specific unpriced unlock figure and timeline are missing — keep on WATCH pending a price range / listing-hearing date.

verified.catalyst: 3-year capital-return plan ($600M buyback through end-2028 + ~$900M quarterly dividends 2026-2028, ~$1.5B total) against $3.18B net cash, but the plan was announced May 25 2026 and is already public and partly priced.
verified.dated_milestone: Plan announced 2026-05-25 (Q1 results); dividend raised to $1.50/ADS goes ex today 2026-06-29; next discrete event is the routine Q2 dividend declaration ~Aug 2026 — no un-fired catalyst.
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete board-committed capital-return figures) and G3 (specific $3.18B net-cash-vs-$3.39B-cap gap) are present, but both already disclosed/priced; no forward un-fired gate.
verified.edge: L — the cash-rich thesis and the exact $1.5B plan are widely written up (Simply Wall St, GuruFocus, Yahoo); stock already re-rated ~35% off its $48.53 year-low to $65.48 (above 50/200-day avg).
verified.primary_source: StockTitan / JOYY Q1 2026 results 6-K, announced 2026-05-25 (net cash $3,175.1M as of 2026-03-31); MarketScreener dividend notices (2026-06-29 ex-date for $1.50/ADS)
verified.analysis: JOYY does have a real, dated, board-committed capital-return program ($600M buyback through end-2028 plus ~$900M dividends across 2026-2028) sitting on $3.18B net cash versus a $3.39B market cap — genuinely concrete and specific. But it was announced over a month ago on May 25 2026, the market has absorbed it (shares up ~35% off the year-low, trading above the 50/200-day averages), and the nearest dated milestone (the bumped $1.50/ADS dividend) goes ex-date TODAY, so it is firing/fired rather than forward and unpriced. What remains is a slow-burn three-year payout cadence with no imminent discrete re-rating event — exactly the "slow-burn not imminent" the triage flagged — so it fails the forward/not-fired gate.

verified.catalyst: Tax-free split of Keurig Dr Pepper into a North American Beverage Co. and the world's largest pure-play Global Coffee Co. (post the closed April 1, 2026 $18.4B JDE Peet's acquisition), expected to unlock sum-of-the-parts plus index-inclusion flow.
verified.dated_milestone: No record or effective date set. Management target "early 2027" as of the June 22, 2026 8-K (slipped from "late 2026"), with workstreams targeting operational readiness by year-end 2026; explicitly gated on "appropriate leverage levels" (~4.5x net leverage) and "supportive market conditions." Next watch-for: a firm dated separation announcement / Global Coffee Co. CEO appointment.
verified.instrument: equity (KDP common); collect ~2.75% dividend while waiting
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (board-committed, named-counterparty deal closed and a concrete public commitment to separate into two named entities). FAILS the dated test: no G3-style currently-unpriced figure on a hard clock — target is soft "early 2027," undated, serially-slipped, discretionary.
verified.edge: L — RR ~0.9:1 at the live $33.29 ($37.7 SoP target vs $28.5 business floor); base-case probability-weighted SoP ~$33-34 sits on top of the price. Stock has already rallied from mid-$20s (50d $29.6 / 200d $28.0) toward mid-range, so the index-flow re-rating is largely priced; market is pricing the spin as a coin-flip, not ignoring it.
verified.primary_source: KDP Form 8-K / "Keurig Dr Pepper Announces Leadership Updates" press release, filed June 22-23, 2026 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0001418135; corroborated by stocktitan.net and keurigdrpepper.com); live quote $33.29 via FMP, 2026-06-29.
verified.analysis: Verification confirms the dossier: the spin is a real, board-committed, fully-financed (Apollo/KKR/T.Rowe $4.5B preferred + ~$9B debt) two-way break-up, but it is NOT a dated catalyst — the June 22, 2026 8-K shows an "early 2027" target (slipped from late 2026), no record/effective date, and explicit conditioning on deleveraging and market conditions, while the designated Global Coffee Co. CEO (Rafa Oliveira) departs end of July 2026 forcing a fresh search. With the stock at $33.29 (mid 52-week range $24.88-$35.94) the reward-to-risk is only ~0.9:1 and the base-case SoP equals the price, so there is little durable mispricing to harvest. Fails the STRICT gate on DATED (no hard clock, slipping, discretionary) and on EDGE (already substantially re-rated) — a patient watch-list name pending a firm dated separation announcement plus stabilized coffee-co leadership, not an ACTIVE bet.

verified.catalyst: KMB's $48.7B acquisition of Kenvue ($3.50 cash + 0.14625 KMB/share) faces FTC second-request plus a new China SAMR info request, with close targeted 2H 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: FTC second-request clearance / China SAMR review; deal close targeted 2H 2026 (next gate: regulatory clearance, no fixed date)
verified.instrument: equity (flagged on acquirer KMB; the actual merger-arb spread/break risk sits in target KVUE)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Kenvue) met; G3 fails on KMB — no specific currently-unpriced figure (the spread lives in KVUE, ~2% gross to implied $19.35 at KMB $108.39; KMB itself already re-rated on the deal)
verified.edge: L — flag is mis-instrumented for merger-arb: edge/spread/break-risk is in the target KVUE, not acquirer KMB; on KMB this is a continuous integration/synergy re-rate already largely priced, closer to a directional thesis than an unpriced dated binary.
verified.primary_source: Kimberly-Clark IR "Shareholders Overwhelmingly Approve" (Jan 29 2026) + Kenvue/KMB deal terms PR (Oct 2025); FTC second request + China SAMR info request reported ~June 1 2026; KMB $108.39 / KVUE $18.93 quotes 2026-06-29
verified.analysis: The merger is real, dated, and forward — both votes passed Jan 29 2026, FTC second request is live, China SAMR added a gate ~June 1 2026, and close is targeted 2H 2026 — so it clears DATED/FORWARD/not-fired and the named-counterparty gate. But it was flagged on the acquirer KMB, where the deal is already substantially re-rated and the path is dominated by continuous integration/leverage/synergy views rather than a clean unpriced binary; the genuine arb spread (KVUE ~$18.93 vs implied ~$19.35, with deal-break downside) sits in the target, not KMB. Acquirer-side, the antitrust/synergy asymmetry is a directional thesis edging toward a macro/integration call, so it does not earn ACTIVE on KMB — downgrade to WATCH and re-route the arb to KVUE.

verified.catalyst: Two dated Phase 3 readouts ahead — DAYBREAK (tarcocimab in wet AMD, 1-yr primary endpoint) and PEAK pivotal analysis 1 (KSI-101 in macular edema secondary to inflammation) — following the positive GLOW2 diabetic-retinopathy win.
verified.dated_milestone: DAYBREAK wet-AMD 1-yr topline ~3Q 2026 (≈Sept 2026); PEAK pivotal analysis 1 readout 4Q 2026 (BLA submission to follow if positive).
verified.bloom_gates: None cleanly met — no G1 named counterparty, no G2 concrete commitment, no G3 specific currently-unpriced figure; these are binary clinical readouts, not a quantifiable Bloom asymmetry.
verified.edge: L — GLOW2 already fired (announced 26-Mar-2026, +19% day) and the stock has re-rated hard YTD (year low $3.60 → ~$37, 200d avg $27); the forward readouts are coin-flip Phase 3 events, not a priced-out asymmetry I can quantify.
verified.primary_source: Kodiak GLOW2 topline PR / 8-K (positive, announced 26-Mar-2026) confirming DAYBREAK 3Q26 and PEAK/KSI-101 4Q26 readout timing; FMP quote KOD $37 (timestamp 2026-06-29).
verified.analysis: GLOW2 is confirmed positive but already fired and re-rated (March 26, 2026 release, ~19% pop), so it is not the forward catalyst. The genuine forward catalysts — DAYBREAK wet-AMD 1-yr topline (3Q 2026, ~Sept) and PEAK/KSI-101 pivotal analysis 1 (4Q 2026) — are real and dated but are binary clinical readouts, not a special-sit with a named counterparty or a specific unpriced figure; asymmetry remains unconfirmed and the name trades near its 200d/50d averages after a large run. Holds at WATCH: dated and forward enough to monitor into the DAYBREAK window, but no clean Bloom gate clears and the edge is low given the prior re-rate.
